data.title: JPEG Protocol pPEG Launches Official Swap Trading Portal
data.description:
The first JPEG protocol, pPEG, has announced the official opening of its DApp's Swap trading portal. According to Odaily, pPEG is built on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC) and utilizes the Uniswap v4 mechanism, integrating integer trading, on-chain hashing, and image generation logic. When users conduct eligible pPEG transactions, the system can generate unique panda images based on transaction data, wallet addresses, block information, and other on-chain parameters.

pPEG connects DeFi trading, token liquidity, NFT collection attributes, and on-chain generated art, allowing each on-chain interaction by users to have visual display value.

data.title: Greeks.live: Altcoin market shows limited recovery; altcoin trading still needs to wait.
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, published an article on the X platform stating that 23,000 BTC options expired on May 1st, with a Put-Call Ratio of 1.13, a maximum price threshold of $76,000, and a notional value of $1.74 billion; 175,000 ETH options expired, with a Put-Call Ratio of 0.94, a maximum price threshold of $2,325, and a notional value of $400 million. He pointed out that market volatility was relatively low this week, with Bitcoin fluctuating around $78,000. Market sentiment gradually calmed, and short-term RV (Real Value Reduction) dropped significantly. Coupled with the release of nearly a quarter of margin positions during monthly settlement, implied volatility for major term options decreased significantly this week. Bitcoin's major term IV (Imperial Risk) fell below 40% across the board, while ETH's major term IV dropped even more, with short-term IV falling below 50% and medium- to long-term IV falling below 60%. Looking at the major options data, Skew (Skew) is relatively stable, and market sentiment remains slightly bearish. Only 6% of options expired this week, with approximately 25% open interest at the end of May and about 30% at the end of June. Large-scale trading was relatively inactive, all signs of consolidation. The analyst also noted that Bitcoin performed significantly better in April than in the previous three months in terms of both price and market activity, but altcoins saw limited recovery. Currently, the focus is primarily on Bitcoin; trading altcoins requires waiting.

data.title: Japan Initiates Loans Under $550 Billion Commitment to U.S. Projects
data.description: Japan has announced the first set of loans as part of its substantial $550 billion commitment to support projects in the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this significant financial move aimed at strengthening economic ties between the two nations. The loans are part of a broader strategy to enhance collaboration and investment in key sectors across the U.S. This initiative underscores Japan's dedication to fostering economic growth and development through strategic partnerships and investments.

data.title: Market Buyback Raises Questions on Authenticity
data.description: A recent buyback involving 25% of the circulating supply has sparked debate over its authenticity. According to PANews, the transaction has led to speculation about whether it represents genuine market demand or is a carefully orchestrated inventory maneuver. The situation has drawn attention from various stakeholders, prompting discussions on the implications for the market.

data.title: The official JPEG protocol pPEG team announced that DApps will soon be able to open NFT trading functionality.
data.description: The first JPEG protocol, pPEG, has been officially announced, and DApps are now officially opening their official Swap transaction portals. pPEG, based on BSC and Uniswap v4 mechanisms, combines integer transactions, on-chain hashing, and image generation logic. When users conduct eligible pPEG transactions, the system can generate a unique panda image based on on-chain parameters such as transaction data, wallet address, and block information. pPEG connects DeFi transactions, token liquidity, NFT collectibles, and on-chain generated art, giving every on-chain interaction of users visual value.

data.title: Treasury Yields Remain Stable Amid Oil Price Fluctuations
data.description: Treasury yields held steady as oil prices traded significantly below their peak from Thursday. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the recent stability in the bond market despite fluctuations in the energy sector. The oil market experienced a notable drop after reaching a high earlier in the week, impacting investor sentiment and market dynamics. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments as they assess potential implications for broader economic conditions. The stability in treasury yields suggests a cautious approach by investors amid ongoing volatility in commodity prices.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Briefed on Military Options in Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has received a briefing from military commanders regarding additional military strategies in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing discussions within the U.S. administration about potential actions in response to tensions in the region. The briefing comes amid heightened geopolitical concerns, with the U.S. evaluating its stance and possible responses to developments in Iran. The situation remains fluid, and further updates are expected as the administration considers its next steps.

data.title: Strategy maintained its May dividend yield at 11.5%, and MSTR's share price saw its first monthly gain in nine months.
data.description: Strategy (MSTR) announced that its perpetual preferred stock Stretch (STRC) will maintain its dividend yield at 11.5% in May, marking the third consecutive month that this level has remained unchanged. According to data, STRC's volume-weighted average price (VWAP) in April was $99.76, close to its par value of $100. Strategy positions STRC as a high-yield savings alternative, aiming to reduce volatility through monthly cash payments. Furthermore, Strategy common stock (MSTR) closed at $165 in April, a 33% increase, ending an eight-month losing streak that began in August 2025. Bitcoin also rose 12% in April, marking its best monthly performance since April 2025. Strategy is currently considering adjusting STRC's dividend frequency from monthly to bi-monthly to further smooth out price volatility. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance Alpha has listed UnifAI Network; holders of 237 points can claim a 95 UAI airdrop.
data.description: Binance Alpha is now listing UnifAI Network (UAI). Users holding at least 237 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim a token airdrop. Users can claim 95 UAI tokens on the Alpha event page, on a first-come, first-served basis. If the event continues, the point threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page.

data.title: Purrlend Faces Security Breach Resulting in $1.52 Million Loss
data.description: Purrlend has reported a security incident involving its deployments on HyperEVM and MegaETH, resulting in a loss of approximately $1.52 million. According to ChainCatcher, attackers compromised the team's 2-of-3 multi-signature wallet, granting malicious EOA accounts permissions such as BRIDGE_ROLE. They exploited these permissions to mint unbacked pUSDm and pUSDC, using them as collateral to borrow assets from the pool. Purrlend has suspended the protocol, revoked the compromised permissions, and is collaborating with security teams, law enforcement, and cross-chain bridge partners to track and recover the funds.

data.title: Strategy Maintains May Dividend on STRC Preferred Stock at 11.5%
data.description: Strategy has announced that it will maintain the May dividend on its STRC perpetual preferred stock at 11.5% for the third consecutive month. According to NS3.AI, the April volume-weighted average price (VWAP) was $99.76, which is close to the $100 par value that Strategy uses as a benchmark for the stock. Additionally, Strategy's common stock closed April at $165, marking a 33% increase and its first positive month in nine months.

data.title: Bakkt Completes Acquisition of DTR to Enhance Digital Settlement Infrastructure
data.description: Digital asset company Bakkt has announced the completion of its acquisition of stablecoin infrastructure firm Distributed Technologies Research (DTR) through a stock transaction. According to Odaily, Bakkt issued over 11.3 million shares to DTR beneficiaries and may issue an additional 725,000 shares. Bakkt CEO Akshay Naheta stated that the deal aims to integrate Bakkt's institutional-grade infrastructure with DTR's native AI payment engine and stablecoin technology, creating a 24/7 digital settlement layer that serves as a crucial bridge between traditional financial systems and next-generation digital assets. Additionally, the company has been renamed Bakkt Inc. Previously, the project raised $48 million in February through a stock sale to address market uncertainties and potential delisting risks.

data.title: Paradigm transferred 2.14 million HYPE tokens to Coinbase over the past two days.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Paradigm has transferred 2.14 million HYPE tokens (worth $86 million) to Coinbase Prime in the past two days.

data.title: MGBX will launch MEGA contracts.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch the MEGAUSDT perpetual contract trading pair on May 1, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Trading opening time: May 1, 2026, 18:00 (SGT). Leverage: Maximum supported 50x.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches UnifAI Network (UAI) Airdrop
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that UnifAI Network (UAI) is now available on Binance Alpha, offering users the opportunity to claim an airdrop of 95 UAI tokens. This initiative is accessible to users who possess at least 237 Binance Alpha Points, with the distribution operating on a first-come, first-served basis.

The airdrop event is structured to adjust the score threshold automatically, decreasing by 5 points every five minutes if the reward pool is not fully distributed. This dynamic approach aims to facilitate broader participation among users with varying point balances. Participants should be aware that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points from their accounts.

To secure their tokens, users must confirm their claim on the Alpha Events page within a 24-hour window. Failure to do so will result in forfeiting the opportunity to receive the airdrop. This requirement underscores the importance of timely action to benefit from the event. The airdrop represents a strategic effort by Binance Alpha to engage its community and reward active participation through innovative token distribution mechanisms.

data.title: a16z Crypto Unstaking Activity: 4,270 HYPE Unstaked, More Scheduled for Next Week
data.description: Arkham data reveals that a16z Crypto has recently unstaked 4,270 HYPE tokens. According to NS3.AI, an additional 30,000 HYPE tokens held by a16z Crypto are set to complete the unstaking process at approximately 20:31 UTC on May 4th next week. This activity highlights ongoing movements within the cryptocurrency market, as investors and firms manage their digital assets strategically.

data.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments company Distributed Technologies Research
data.description: Digital asset company Bakkt announced the completion of its acquisition of stablecoin infrastructure company Distributed Technologies Research (DTR) through an equity transaction. Under the agreement, Bakkt issued over 11.3 million shares to DTR beneficial holders, with the potential issuance of approximately 725,000 additional shares. Bakkt CEO Akshay Naheta stated that the transaction aims to combine Bakkt's institutional-grade infrastructure with DTR's native AI payment engine and stablecoin technology to build a 24/7 digital settlement layer, providing a crucial bridge between the traditional financial system and next-generation digital assets. Furthermore, the company has been renamed Bakkt Inc. Previously, the project raised $48 million through a stock sale in February to address market uncertainty and potential delisting risks. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump Sons Involved in Merger with Kazakh Mineral Group
data.description:
Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump have reportedly merged a shell company with a key mineral group in Kazakhstan, according to ChainCatcher. The Financial Times reported that the Kazakh group received up to $1.6 billion in support from the U.S. government last year for developing tungsten mining projects.

The tungsten project involves the Katpar and Upper Kairakty deposits in northern Kazakhstan, with financing provided by institutions such as the U.S. Export-Import Bank. The Trump sons are expected to join the advisory board of the related company and hold shares by the end of 2024. The report suggests this is another instance of the Trump family's business empire being linked to U.S. government interests.

data.title: Trump's son merged with Kazakhstan's Key Minerals Group through a shell company. The latter had previously received $1.6 billion in government funding for tungsten mining.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump, the eldest sons of Donald Trump, have merged a shell company with a key mining group in Kazakhstan. This group received up to $1.6 billion in government funding last year for tungsten mining projects. The report indicates that the tungsten project involves the Katpar and Upper Kairakty deposits in northern Kazakhstan. The Export-Import Bank of the United States and other institutions have provided financing. Trump's sons will join the company's advisory board and hold shares by the end of 2024. (FT)

data.title: Arkham-Tagged Address Completes HYPE Unstaking and Transfers
data.description: An address tagged by Arkham as belonging to a16z has completed the unstaking of 4,270 HYPE tokens, according to Foresight News. Of these, 3,875 tokens were transferred to an address starting with 0xeeb. Additionally, the address is set to complete the unstaking of 30,000 HYPE tokens around 4 a.m. on May 5, UTC+8.
